Introducing

Scripture Studio
Book Society

A live, voice-powered gathering where serious Bible students
come together to go deeper into the Word.

🗓 Saturday, May 23, 2026  ·  1:00–3:00 PM CT
 

This is not a webinar. This is not a lecture. This is a live, intimate audio room — a place where the Word gets opened, questions get asked, and real conversation happens between people who take Scripture seriously.

I'm hosting the very first session of Scripture Studio Book Society on May 23rd, and I want you in the room.

🥂 Signature Edition Exclusive

$19.99 Members Only — After Party Access Included

When the main session wraps, the room stays open — but only for Signature Edition members. The After Party is an unscripted, open-mic continuation where we go deeper, get personal, and keep the conversation going. No agenda. Just real talk. This perk is exclusive to the $19.99 Signature Edition.

🔥 Going Fast — Limited Seating — Act Now

This is a live voice room — not a replay, not a recording. Seats are capped to keep the conversation intimate and personal. When it's full, the door closes. Don't be the one who waited too long.
